title: Sprint
author: Jake Knapp
description: Run a Google Ventures design sprint in five days with 5 Claude Code skills covering mapping, sketching, deciding, prototyping, and testing.
longDescription: Jake Knapp's battle-tested five-day process from Google Ventures turns big problems into tested solutions in one week. These 5 skills walk you through each day — Monday's problem mapping, Tuesday's solution sketching, Wednesday's decision-making, Thursday's rapid prototyping, and Friday's user testing — giving you a structured framework for tackling any product or business challenge at sprint speed.
